notes: SUSTech custom release line after upstream v2.10.0 merge plus tracked post-v2.10.0 patchset through 137e0e5. v0.3.0 adopts upstream v2.10 prompt architecture, Confirm UI, template-fill workflow, direct SVG edit live preview, and post-tag source/export fixes while preserving SUSTech release identity, template audit flow, and the formal ppt_text_normalize visual review gate introduced in v0.2.x.
